title: NarratedScene
description: One narrated scene, produced by the engine. The SAME object is the viewer's live SSE event (D7) and the library's stored entry (D6); media fields are engine-served URLs.

title.description: Model-generated short title for the slate/thumbnail text; engines may fall back to derive_title for legacy or malformed model output.

clip_url.description: Short viewer clip for library revisit/share, either uploaded or assembled by the engine from timestamped capture frames.

engine.description: Provenance + latency breakdown (the inference team's scoreboard).

seq.description: Monotonic engine event id - SSE id: field; clients resume with Last-Event-ID.

captured_at.description: From the source MomentEnvelope - the library's chronology key (created_at is engine time).

owner.description: Reserved for multi-user: identity that owns the scene. v1 single-user engines emit a constant.

share_token.description: Reserved: capability token for visibility=shared links. Enforcement spec lands with the library milestone.

duration.description: Authoritative playback duration in seconds — the narration/voice audio length, which is the single-clock player's clock (NOT the source-clip length). Additive in v1.2.0; optional.

keyframe_time.description: Offset in seconds from the start of the source clip of the producer-selected poster frame (the image itself is media.frame_url). Poster provenance, not a codec keyframe. Additive in v1.2.0; optional.

timed_captions.description: Speech-relative caption cues (aligner-produced) for the viewer CC track + accessibility. Times are relative to the trimmed narration audio. Additive in v1.2.0; optional.

allOf.description: Version-truth: any field introduced in v1.2.0 forces contract_version 1.2.0, so a producer can never emit new fields while stamping the old version.
